english.backupReminderMessage: You have {count} notes stored locally in your browser. Export a backup before clearing browser data or switching devices.
english.deleteAllUndoMessage: All notes moved to Recently Deleted.
english.importPreviewText: Adds {addCount} notes, skips {skipCount} duplicates. Merge keeps existing notes; Replace overwrites the current list.
english.settingsSubtitle: Local-first controls for privacy, backups, and the writing feel.
english.settingsBackupRecoveryTagline: Keep notes portable and recover from mistakes.
english.settingsLanguageTagline: Change the interface or add your own language pack.
english.settingsExperienceTagline: Quiet optional details that stay out of your writing.
english.settingsCelebrationsTagline: Small visual rewards after milestones. Off by default.
english.settingsSoundEffectsTagline: Soft interface sounds for feedback. Off by default.
english.settingsInstallThoughtsTagline: Launch faster from your home screen and keep offline access close.
english.settingsUpdateAvailableTagline: Version {version} is ready. Install now and reload when you choose.
english.settingsOfflineUpdate: Connect to the internet and try again.
english.settingsAboutTagline: Privacy, offline details, release build, and creator links.
english.pageZoomOn: Browser zoom is available when you need larger text.
english.pageZoomOff: Kept locked for an app-like layout on this device.
english.name: English
english.deleteAllConfirmText: This can’t be undone and all your notes will be removed.
english.deleteAllEmptyMessage: Deleting... air? Impressive. Maybe try writing something before going full cleanup mode?
english.deletePostConfirmText: This can’t be undone and it will be removed from your timeline.
english.noPostsMessage: No notes available. Start by adding a new note above.
english.noResultsMessage: No matching notes found. Try refining your search or adding a new note.
english.exportEmptyMessage: Exporting... nothing? A bold move. Maybe try filling the page before sending emptiness into the void?
english.importErrorInvalidFile: Nice try, but we only accept JSON files. What’s this, a rebellious PDF?
english.importErrorNotThoughts: This JSON isn’t from Thoughts App. Did you just whip this up in Notepad to mess with me?
english.importErrorInvalidFormat: Invalid format. This JSON is as useful as a screen door on a submarine.
english.importErrorInvalidJSON: That’s not even valid JSON. What did you do, feed it through a blender?
english.importConfirmText: You’ve got existing notes. Merge them with the new ones or replace everything?
english.importSuccessMerge: Notes merged successfully. Look at you, playing nice with your old ideas!
english.importSuccessReplace: Notes replaced. Old stuff’s gone—hope you didn’t like it too much!
english.importSuccessFirst: Notes imported successfully. You’re finally contributing something!
english.footerAndroidGuide: Android: Menu (⋮) > Add to Home screen.
english.footerIOSGuide: iOS: Share (⬆) > Add to Home Screen.
english.footerPrivacy: Thoughts is secure & private. No data collected—your notes stay local.
english.discardConfirmText: You have unsaved changes. Discard them to edit this post?
english.deleteLanguageConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete
english.charLimitMessage: Whoa there! Only {count} characters are allowed. Extra characters? Poof—they’re gone!
english.webStoreNote: Download your favorite language from the site and upload it to the app using the Upload Language option.
english.invalidFileMessage: Please upload a valid JSON file.
english.notThoughtsLanguage: This is not a Thoughts app language file. Only official Thoughts language packs are allowed.
english.invalidJSONMessage: Could not parse the JSON file. Please ensure it’s valid.
english.refreshMessage: The app will refresh to apply changes.
english.emptyPostMessage: You haven’t written anything yet! Add some text before posting.
english.updateMessage: The app will refresh to apply the new version. Unsaved changes will be preserved.
english.updateFailedMessage: Could not complete update. Please try again.
english.footerDescription: Efficiently crafted: Entire app under 1MB, including all assets.
english.volumeNotificationMessage: For the best experience with sound effects, please turn your device volume to maximum.
english.emptyNoteMessage: Write a thought first, then tap Add.
english.updateInstallingMessage: Preparing version {version}. Your current draft is kept safe.
english.updateReadyMessage: Version {version} is installed. Reload to finish switching over.
english.aboutSubtitle: A fast local notebook for private thoughts, tasks, memories, and ideas.
english.aboutPrivateStorageText: Notes are stored locally in your browser on this device.
english.aboutPrivacyText: Clearing browser data can delete your notes. Export a backup regularly before resetting the browser, changing devices, or clearing storage.
english.updateFailedTrySettings: Update failed. Try again from Settings.
english.storageFullMessage: Cannot save note: storage limit reached. Delete some notes to free space.
english.savePostFailed: Failed to save note. Try again.
english.pinLimitMessage: One note is already pinned. Unpin it first.
english.godModeTapsRemaining: {count} more taps to unlock God Mode
english.celebrationsOffMessage: Celebrations are off. Enable them in Settings.
english.installPromptMessage: Thoughts can be installed for offline use
english.recentlyDeletedEmpty: No deleted notes. Items stay here for {days} days.
english.languageStoreSubtitle: Browse webstore language packs and install them directly.
english.languageStoreWebSubtitle: Browse curated language packs and install them directly into Thoughts.
english.languageStoreUnavailableMessage: Open the webstore to download a language pack, then use Upload language from Settings.
english.languageStoreDefaultDescription: Download and use this language in Thoughts.
english.settingsGuidesTagline: Markdown, shortcuts, backup, sharing, and daily use tips.
english.guidesSubtitle: Fast capture, local backups, markdown, search, sharing, and shortcuts.
english.guideCaptureText: Use @title for a quick title and #hashtags for projects, memories, tasks, or themes. Drafts save quietly while you type.
english.guideMobileShare: Share notes as text, image, or clipboard copy
english.guideMobilePin: Keep one important note at the top
english.guideMobileSettings: Open backups, language, updates, guides, and About
english.guideMobileBuild: Tap the build label 7 times to unlock God Mode
english.guideSearchText: Use #tag, @title, quoted exact phrases, or recent to quickly narrow notes.
english.guideBackupText: Notes are stored locally in your browser. Export backups regularly, especially before clearing browser data or changing devices. Deleted notes can be restored from Recently Deleted.
english.guideShareText: Use each note's Share action to share plain text, copy to clipboard, or generate a clean image card.
english.guideLanguageText: Choose a built-in language, upload a language pack, or install packs directly from the Language Store.
english.settingsImportTagline: Bring notes back from a Thoughts backup file.

hinglish.backupReminderMessage: Aapke {count} vichaar is yantra ke andar baithe hain. Safai ya yantra badalne se pehle nakal nikaal lo, warna yaadein hawa.
hinglish.undoDeleteMessage: Vichaar abhi kachre ke dabbe mein gaya hai.
hinglish.deleteAllUndoMessage: Saare vichaar kachre ke dabbe mein chale gaye.
hinglish.importPreviewText: {addCount} vichaar judenge, {skipCount} judwaa chhootenge. Milaao mein purane rahenge; palto mein abhi wali soochi badal jayegi.
hinglish.settingsSubtitle: Nijta, bachaav aur likhai ka poora desi niyantran.
hinglish.settingsBackupRecoveryTagline: Vichaar saath rakho, galti se bach jao.
hinglish.settingsLanguageTagline: Roop badlo ya apni bhasha ki potli daalo.
hinglish.settingsExperienceTagline: Chhoti cheezein, likhai ka dhyaan nahi khaayengi.
hinglish.settingsCelebrationsTagline: Manzil par chhota dhamaka. Pehle se band.
hinglish.settingsSoundEffectsTagline: Dabane par halki awaaz. Pehle se band.
hinglish.settingsInstallThoughtsTagline: Ghar ke parde se tez khule, bina net bhi chale.
hinglish.settingsUpdateAvailableTagline: Sanskarn {version} taiyaar hai. Abhi bithaao, phir jab mann kare taaza karo.
hinglish.settingsOfflineUpdate: Pehle net jodo, phir koshish karo.
hinglish.settingsAboutTagline: Nijta, bina net ka kaam, sanskarn, aur banane wale ke jod.
hinglish.pageZoomOn: Bade akshar chahiye toh panna phula sakte ho.
hinglish.pageZoomOff: Is yantra par anuprayog-jaisa roop bachane ke liye band hai.
hinglish.imageGeneratorUnavailable: Tasveer banane wala so raha hai
hinglish.name: Masaledaar Hindi
hinglish.deleteAllConfirmText: Ek baar gaye toh phir rona mat. Saare vichaar hawa ho jayenge.
hinglish.deleteAllEmptyMessage: Kya udaoge bhai? Yahan toh pehle se registan hai.
hinglish.deletePostConfirmText: Yeh dhara se chala jayega. Wapas laana mushkil scene hai.
hinglish.noPostsMessage: Abhi kuch nahi. Upar ek vichaar daalo, khaali mat baitho.
hinglish.noResultsMessage: Kuch nahi mila. Talaash badlo ya naya vichaar daalo.
hinglish.exportEmptyMessage: Khaali dastaavez bhejoge? Pehle kuch likho, warna hawa ka parcel banega.
hinglish.importErrorInvalidFile: Sirf sahi .json dastaavez chalega. Yeh kaunsi nautanki hai?
hinglish.importErrorNotThoughts: Yeh Vichaar ka potla nahi hai. Kahin se jugaad karke laaye ho kya?
hinglish.importErrorInvalidFormat: Dhang ulta-pulta hai. Dastaavez nahi, bhel puri lag rahi hai.
hinglish.importErrorInvalidJSON: Yeh .json bhi nahi lag raha. Blender mein ghuma diya kya?
hinglish.importConfirmText: Purane vichaar pade hain. Naye milaane hain ya sab palatna hai?
hinglish.importSuccessMerge: Vichaar mil gaye. Purane aur naye ek thali mein.
hinglish.importSuccessReplace: Vichaar palat gaye. Purana maal gaya, bhai sambhal ke.
hinglish.importSuccessFirst: Vichaar aa gaye. Chalo, ab kuch toh bhar gaya.
hinglish.footerOfflineText: Vichaar ko bina net ke liye basao:
hinglish.footerAndroidGuide: Phone: teen bindu (⋮) > Ghar parde par daalo.
hinglish.footerIOSGuide: Seb phone: baanto (⬆) > Ghar parde par daalo.
hinglish.footerPrivacy: Vichaar surakshit aur niji hai. Koi jaankari nahi uthata—sab aapke paas hi.
hinglish.discardConfirmText: Kuch likha hai jo bacha nahi. Chhodkar is vichaar ko badalna hai?
hinglish.charLimitMessage: Bas {count} akshar chalenge. Baaki sab poof—gaye!
hinglish.webStoreNote: Pasand ki bhasha sthal se lao aur Bhasha chadhaao se Vichaar mein daalo.
hinglish.notThoughtsLanguage: Yeh Vichaar ki bhasha potli nahi hai. Sirf asli potli chalegi.
hinglish.invalidJSONMessage: .json padh nahi paaye. Dhang se bani hai ya nahi, dekho.
hinglish.refreshMessage: Badlaav lagaane ke liye Vichaar taaza hoga.
hinglish.emptyPostMessage: Abhi tak kuch nahi likha. Daalo kuch, phir bhejo.
hinglish.updateMessage: Vichaar taaza hoke naya sanskarn lagaayega. Jo likh rahe ho, woh surakshit rahega.
hinglish.updateFailedMessage: Kaam poora nahi hua. Phir se koshish karo.
hinglish.footerDescription: Poora Vichaar 1MB se kam. Halka hai boss.
hinglish.volumeNotificationMessage: Awaaz wale nakhre ka poora maza chahiye toh awaaz poori kar do.
hinglish.emptyNoteMessage: Pehle ek vichaar likho, phir Daalo dabao.
hinglish.updateInstallingMessage: Sanskarn {version} taiyaar ho raha hai. Aapka likha surakshit hai.
hinglish.updateReadyMessage: Sanskarn {version} baith gaya. Poora badlaav chahiye toh taaza karo.
hinglish.aboutSubtitle: Niji vichaar, kaam, yaadein aur soch ke liye tez desi khata.
hinglish.aboutHeroTitle: Abhi pakdo. Baad mein raaj karo.
hinglish.aboutPrivateStorageText: Vichaar is yantra ke andar hi rakhe hain.
hinglish.aboutPrivacyText: Yantra ki safai karoge toh vichaar ja sakte hain. Yantra badalne ya jagah saaf karne se pehle nakal nikaal lo.
hinglish.updateFailedTrySettings: Sanskarn atak gaya. Bandobast se phir koshish karo.
hinglish.storageFullMessage: Vichaar bach nahi paaya: jagah khatam. Thode vichaar udaao.
hinglish.savePostFailed: Vichaar bach nahi paaya. Phir koshish karo.
hinglish.pinLimitMessage: Ek vichaar pehle se chipka hai. Pehle usse hatao.
hinglish.godModeAlreadyUnlocked: Devta roop pehle se khula hai
hinglish.godModeTapsRemaining: Devta roop ke liye {count} thapki aur
hinglish.celebrationsOffMessage: Jashn band hai. Bandobast mein chalu karo.
hinglish.installPromptMessage: Vichaar bina net ke liye bas sakta hai
hinglish.recentlyDeletedEmpty: Koi uda hua vichaar nahi. Cheezein {days} din yahan rukengi.
hinglish.emptyExampleIdea: @Vichaar Ghar mein baantne wala jugaad banao #kaam
hinglish.languageStoreSubtitle: Webstore ki bhasha potliyan dekho aur seedha bithaao.
hinglish.languageStoreWebSubtitle: Curated bhasha packs dekho aur seedha Thoughts mein bithaao.
hinglish.languageStoreUnavailableMessage: Bhasha potli utaarne ke liye web dukaan kholo, phir Settings se Bhasha chadhaao use karo.
hinglish.languageStoreDefaultDescription: Is bhasha ko Thoughts mein utaaro aur chalao.
hinglish.settingsGuidesTagline: Markdown, shortcuts, backup, sharing, aur roz ka istemaal.
hinglish.guidesSubtitle: Tez likhai, local backup, markdown, search, sharing, aur shortcuts.
hinglish.guideCaptureText: @title se chhota title banao aur #hashtags se project, yaad, task, ya theme pakdo. Draft chup-chaap save hota rahega.
hinglish.guideShortcutEscape: Edit cancel ya search clear karo
hinglish.guideMobileShare: Notes ko text, image, ya clipboard copy ke roop mein baanto
hinglish.guideMobilePin: Ek zaroori note ko upar rakho
hinglish.guideMobileSettings: Backup, bhasha, updates, guides, aur About kholo
hinglish.guideMobileBuild: God Mode ke liye build label ko 7 baar tap karo
hinglish.guideSearchText: #tag, @title, quoted exact phrases, ya recent se notes jaldi chhanto.
hinglish.guideBackupText: Notes browser mein locally stored hain. Browser data clear ya device change se pehle backup export karo. Deleted notes Recently Deleted se restore ho sakte hain.
hinglish.guideShareText: Har note ke Share action se plain text, clipboard copy, ya clean image card bana sakte ho.
hinglish.guideLanguageText: Built-in bhasha chuno, language pack upload karo, ya Language Store se seedha bithaao.
hinglish.settingsImportTagline: Thoughts backup file se notes wapas lao.
